findings.evidence: `nl` shows the theorem at lines 35-49 under `namespace TauCeti.Algebra`; `rg -n "adjoin_eq_top|Submodule\.span|Algebra\.adjoin" TauCeti/Algebra -g'*.lean'` finds this generic theorem only in `TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule/MatrixCoefficientAdjoin.lean:44-45`, before the comodule namespace begins at line 53.
findings.fix: Move this theorem to a generic algebra-oriented TauCeti file, or keep the statement local/private here if it is only intended as an implementation helper for `matrixCoefficientSubalgebra_eq_top_of_submodule_eq_top`.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.Algebra.adjoin_eq_top_of_span_eq_top` is a general `Algebra.adjoin`/`Submodule.span` theorem with no comodule or matrix-coefficient dependency, so placing it in `Comodule/MatrixCoefficientAdjoin.lean` hides broadly useful algebra API behind a specialized comodule file.

summary: The matrix-coefficient generated subobjects are in the natural comodule/matrix-coefficient file, but the PR also adds a generic algebra lemma under that specialized comodule import.
